race.comment: GEOSTORM (2) led and won here when off a freshen over 1206m in a strong performance in this grade. He rises in weight, but he should be better for that effort and this can set up similarly with Boudvillain now on board. Expecting him to be up front and in this race for a very long way. FAERYWOOD (1) shapes nicely for this event on the back of a maiden victory in his first run for the new stable. He was too good from the front there and he can press on from the draw to be prominent again here for Keatings. Has more upside than his rivals and can repeat the dose. EXOTHRILL (4) will find this much easier than what he's been racing in. He's been well beaten in Provincial company recently, though back to this company can see him recapture his best form. BO COUGAR (8) was solid on return behind GEOSTORM and can't be left out of calculations. BEAU ROCK (6) is ticking along nicely and is not to be discounted.
